scopes.delivery-zones.update: Permission to update the stores delivery zones
scopes.driver.fulfillment.delete: Permission to un-assign driver to orders
scopes.driver.fulfillment.update: Permission to assign driver to orders
scopes.orders.amend: Permission to update an orders status
scopes.orders.get: Permission to see the full order details
scopes.orders.refund: Permission to partially refund an order
scopes.orders.update: Permission to update an orders status or details
scopes.store.coupons.delete: Permission to delete a store coupon
scopes.store.opening-hours.get: Permission to get the stores opening hours
scopes.store.opening-hours.update: Permission to update the stores opening hours
scopes.store.sections.list: Permission to get the store kitchen sections
scopes.store.status.update: Permission to pause or resume the store
